title: January 2022 product brainstorm — car-trash-can starter kit, LED umbrella, raingear
html:
TL;DR

  • Four-line note from January 2022 listing physical-product business ideas: car trash can, LED umbrella, custom raingear jackets, self-defense gear, "pallet of products."
  • Earliest in-vault evidence of yahir ecommerce fantasy — Yahir thinking like a Shaan Puri–style "pallet of random goods" Amazon-FBA / dropship-curious freshman.
  • LED umbrella + raingear jackets implicitly a Corvallis-weather observation — the Pacific-Northwest constant rain becomes product opportunity in the freshman frame.
  • Self-defense gear sits next to consumer accessories in the same brainstorm — a recurring tic across Yahir's 2018–2022 notes (concealed carry curiosity thread).
  • This note is a sibling of 2018 07 27 td ameritrade and the broader young yahir business impulse of "list ten products to sell" — pre-software, pre-SaaS, pre-outpace.

What's actually in the note

Five lines:

  • LED Umbrella
  • Custom Raingear Jackets
  • Safety and Self Defense gear
  • Pallet of Products
  • (title) Car accessories: trash can

Why it matters

The product-brainstorm impulse precedes the SaaS / software-startup pivot by two years. This note dates Yahir's "I should sell something physical" instinct to early freshman year, which makes the 2024 2026 saas pivot arc more legible — he tried thinking like a physical-product founder first.

The "pallet of products" line is the giveaway — that's the Shaan Puri / Amazon-FBA-creator-economy vocabulary that was peaking on Twitter circa 2021. Yahir was clearly absorbing that content even as a freshman.

Open questions

  • Did any of these get further than this note? (No evidence — none of the four ideas surface again in the 2022 corpus.)
  • Was FB Marketplace the planned launch channel? (Likely — he uses it heavily in 2022 04 18 math 231 quiz.)

Wikilinks
